text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer! I got plenty of rest and
I'm feeling amped!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I took advantage of the break to run all
the way to the ocean!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! There's no better feeling than running
toward the wide open sea!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, I got to shout my dreams at the
sunset! It was the best break ever!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Now I'm ready to throw myself back into training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Bamboo Memory had a very
productive break.
